description: Module add applied — Offers, which needs no customer-side setup (composer is in the dashboard, no external account needed)

expected.subject: Offers is live on your account
expected.body:
Hi Priya,

Good news — Offers is now active on your account.

  • New monthly: £23/mo (from today)
  • One-off setup for Offers: already added to the
    invoice you just paid

No set-up needed on your side — Offers just appears
on your site / in your dashboard from today.

Any questions, hit reply.

— ModuForge
